title: TLRY Earnings: Highlights of Tilray's Q2 2023 Financial Results
text: Tilray reported Q2 2023 financial results with a net loss of $61.6 million or $0.11 per share, compared to a profit of $5.8 million or breakeven per share in the prior-year period. Net revenue declined 7% to $144.2 million. Cannabis gross profit increased 37% to approximately $19 million despite revenue decline, showing operational improvements. Adjusted EBITDA was $11.7 million, down 15% year-over-year. For fiscal 2023, the company reaffirmed expectations of generating $70 million to $80 million of adjusted EBITDA. The quarter reflected marketplace saturation challenges in Canada and COVID impacts on operations. However, management expressed confidence in their ability to emerge from short-term market challenges stronger, more diversified and more profitable.
